unique_vulnerabilities.name: Unchecked Low-Level Call in callAddress()
unique_vulnerabilities.reasoning: All findings reference the low-level call in callAddress() on lines 10-13, including unchecked return value, lack of zero-check, and external call to user-supplied address.

unique_vulnerabilities.name: Outdated Solidity Version
unique_vulnerabilities.reasoning: Both findings highlight the use of an outdated Solidity version with known issues.
